channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Zimbabwe Scrutinizes Chinese Lithium Mining
item.description: Zimbabwe Scrutinizes Chinese Lithium Mining — via Africa Defense Forum #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: AI and Africa’s Knowledge Revolution: Why the Greatest Threat Is Not AI, But Our Failure to Understand It
item.description: THE Misunderstood Technology of Our Time: Few technologies in modern history have generated as much excitement, anxiety, misunderstanding and speculation as Artificial Intelligence. Across Zimbabwe, Southern Africa and much of the African continent, conversations about AI are often characterised by extremes. Some view it as a revolutionary force that will transform every aspect of human [...] The post AI and Africa’s Knowledge Revolution: Why the Greatest Threat Is Not AI, But Our Failure to Understand It appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Ngarava takes charge as Zimbabwe name squad for Bangladesh Test @3menonaboat @ZimCricketv
item.description:
Zimbabwe Cricket has named a 15-man squad for the one-off Test against Bangladesh

The post Ngarava takes charge as Zimbabwe name squad for Bangladesh Test first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Scott Sakupwanya Confirms Kaizer Chiefs Negotiations as Scottland FC Eye New Signings
item.description: Scott Sakupwanya Confirms Kaizer Chiefs Negotiations as Scottland FC Eye New Signings Castle Lager Premier Soccer League pacesetters Scottland FC have intensified efforts to bolster their squad, with club president Scott Sakupwanya confirming that discussions are underway with South African powerhouse Kaizer Chiefs over potential player acquisitions. The ambitious Harare-based side is looking to strengthen [...] The post Scott Sakupwanya Confirms Kaizer Chiefs Negotiations as Scottland FC Eye New Signings appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Lungu family wins court battle over former Zambian leader’s body
item.description: Legal battle over burial might be over - but Zambian government can still appeal The post Lungu family wins court battle over former Zambian leader’s body appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Death Threats Will Not Silence Me, Says Chibaya @263Chat
item.description: By Kudzaishe Chimonera Former CCC legislator Amos Chibaya says he remains undiscouraged by anonymous death threats he recently received describing them as attempts to intimidate him and prevent his participation in politics. Speaking after reporting the matter to the police, Chibaya said he received a [...] The post Death Threats Will Not Silence Me, Says Chibaya appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: After Poison Scare Years Ago, Matemadanda Dies — Mnangagwa “Seizes” Funeral
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s public mourning of Ambassador Victor Matemadanda is being slammed as hollow and calculated, with insiders... Continue reading "After Poison Scare Years Ago, Matemadanda Dies — Mnangagwa “Seizes” Funeral" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Opposition Leader Fumes Over Rally Ban, Vows To Remove Zanu PF @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: By A Correspondent| Tensions are rising in Masvingo after opposition politician Benefit Chikomo accused authorities of stifling political freedoms by... Continue reading "Opposition Leader Fumes Over Rally Ban, Vows To Remove Zanu PF" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Paramedics to Take Centre Stage in National Health Event @263Chat
item.description: Zimbabwe is set to commemorate International Paramedics Day for the first time on 8 July with a series of events designed to celebrate the contribution of emergency medical personnel and raise public awareness about the vital role they play in saving lives. The national celebrations, [...] The post Paramedics to Take Centre Stage in National Health Event appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Global shares mostly slip amid caution about the war in Iran
item.description: TOKYO — Global shares mostly declined on Tuesday as recent enthusiasm cooled and markets faced uncertainty about efforts to end the war in Iran. France’s CAC 40 dipped 1.0% in early trading to 8,313.86, while the German DAX fell 1.6% to 24,746.63. Britain’s FTSE 100 declined 0.6% to 10,379.26. U.S. shares were set to drift [...] The post Global shares mostly slip amid caution about the war in Iran appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
